status: NOT DEPLOYED — mainnet-ready, real-RWA micro-instance. Deploy wires the vault to mUSD (rebasing wrapper of Ondo USDY, so on-chain NAV accrues real yield). Run `DEPOSIT_AMOUNT=<mUSD wei> PRIVATE_KEY=<funded key> forge script script/DeployMainnet.s.sol:DeployMainnet --rpc-url mantle --broadcast` (omit DEPOSIT_AMOUNT to deploy wiring only). Needs a funded Mantle key: real MNT for gas + mUSD to deposit. Contracts are UNAUDITED (SECURITY.md) — keep deposits at demo scale.

assets.comment: Verified live Mantle mainnet assets the system wires to.

dex.comment: FusionX V2 (Uniswap-V2-style) on Mantle mainnet. Router/factory RPC-verified on-chain 2026-06-04 (factory() matches; live USDC/WMNT pool quotes ~0.585 USDC/MNT). FusionXAdapter is fork-tested against this router + pool (test/FusionXAdapter.fork.t.sol).
dex.name: FusionX V2

methRate.comment: mETH is non-rebasing: validator yield accrues in the mETH->ETH exchange rate, which lives on L1 ETHEREUM (chain 1), not Mantle L2 - the bridged L2 token has no rate function. MethRateAdapter reads this to mark held mETH to ETH so vault NAV reflects REAL staking yield. RPC-verified 2026-06-12: mETHToETH(1e18) = 1.0935e18 (~9.3% accrued). Fork-tested in test/MethRateAdapter.fork.t.sol (opt-in via ETHEREUM_RPC).

methDeployment.comment: A2 - REAL mainnet mETH vault, LIVE on Mantle mainnet (chain 5000, deployed 2026-06-12). Custodies real mETH; MethRateAdapter marks it to ETH via the MethRate store (seeded to the live L1 mETHToETH rate 1.0935e18), so vault NAV reflects REAL accrued staking yield. Deposited 0.000717221909343180 mETH (full key balance); 80% deployed into the strategy, 20% idle. Observed on-chain nav() = 1.0747e18 (the 80% deployed slice marked up at the 1.0935 rate). All 6 contracts Mantlescan-verified (Etherscan-V2, chainid=5000). agents/scripts/meth_rate_push.py keeps the L2 rate synced from L1 (run on a cron with METH_PRIVATE_KEY + ETHEREUM_RPC). UNAUDITED - demo scale.
